prestazioni: Engine swap to a **LS6 (Gen III, 5.7L, 385hp)** from a 2001-2004 Chevrolet Corvette Z06, retaining the 4L60-E automatic transmission but upgrading to a **Sonnax Smart Shell** valve body and **TransGo shift kit** for firmer, faster shifts under boost. Pair with a **Precision Turbo PT6266 CEA** turbocharger (62mm inducer, 84mm exducer) on a custom **S&S Headers 1.75" primary tube manifold** with a **Tial MV-R 44mm wastegate** and **TurboSmart Race Port BOV** to handle 18psi of boost on 93 octane.

Full **JE Pistons forged 2618 alloy** (9.5:1 compression) with **Manley H-beam connecting rods** and **ARP 2000 rod bolts**, paired with a **Callaway CNC-ported LS6 cylinder head** featuring **Ferrea 224/224 .600" lift camshaft** (112 LSA) and **COMP Cams beehive valve springs**. Oil system upgraded to a **Moroso 7-quart aluminum pan** with **Melling high-volume oil pump** and **Moroso pickup** for sustained high-RPM operation.

Fuel system overhaul with **Bosch 044 inline fuel pump** (supplemented by a **AEM 340lph in-tank pump**), **Siemens DEKA 80lb/hr injectors**, and a **Holley Dominator ECU** running **EFI University custom tune** for E85 compatibility. Ignition system upgraded to **MSD 8.5mm Super Conductor wires** and **NGK TR6IX iridium plugs** gapped at .030" for optimal combustion under forced induction.
estetica: Full **RK Sport Bravada-specific widebody kit** (2.5" fender flares, carbon fiber hood with functional scoop) paired with a **Stillen GT-R-style front splitter** and **APR Performance GT-250 rear wing** for downforce. Custom **Bravada-only** **VIS Racing Racing Series** side skirts and rear diffuser for aggressive stance.

Suspension overhaul with **KW Variant 3 coilovers** (adjustable rebound/compression, 2.5" drop) and **Hotchkis Sport sway bars** (25mm front, 22mm rear) to eliminate body roll. Wheel setup: **Forgeline GA3R 18x9.5" +25 offset** with **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2** (255/40/18 front, 275/35/18 rear) for maximum grip.

Interior stripped and rebuilt with **Recaro SRD racing seats** (fixed-back, 6-point harnesses), **MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel** (350mm, suede), and **Defi BF gauges** (boost, oil pressure, wideband AFR) mounted in a **custom A-pillar pod**. Full **Dynamat Xtreme sound deadening** and **Vintage Air Gen-IV SureFit** climate control for track-day comfort.
